digest.component_or_area: CLI command reference generator and CI drift gate
propositions: Generate docs/cli-reference.md from the CLI's own help data so the command reference cannot drift.
Document both command families: 50 help-backed subcommands with full pinned help and 16 intercept-arm commands with curated one-line descriptions.
Avoid subprocess-capturing --help for intercept commands because some (e.g. enrich) have no argparse parser and print JSON with exit 0, storing garbage as help.
Drift-gate the INTERCEPT_COMMANDS key set against the intercept ladder parsed from _cli/__init__.py so an unlisted intercept fails the generator.
Provide a --check mode that regenerates in memory and exits non-zero if the committed file differs.
Wire the drift gate into both test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml, enforced by the CI workflow parity test.
